title: ACTREC Notification 2026 - Walk-in-Interview for Clinical Research Coordinator Posts
description: The Advanced Centre for Treatment, Research and Education in Cancer (ACTREC) has declared the official notification for 2026. To fill up the vacancies for various Clinical Research Coordinator Jobs. Those candidates who have qualified in the B.Sc, B.Pharm. M.Sc can grab this chance and apply for the ACTREC Notification 2026 . Here we mentioned more details about the age limit, selection process, salarystructure, education details, applciation fee, and how to apply for these posts. If you are ...
